title: rosa onoei f. plena
intro: Rosa onoei f. plena, also known as the Double Japanese Rose or Double Onoe Rose, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Rosa onoei f. plena has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rosa onoei f. plena can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a topical application to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
